title: rosa canina var. tomentosa
intro: Rosa canina var. tomentosa, also known as the hairy dog rose or tomentose dog rose, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. tomentosa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting wound healing and immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in skincare products and supplements to promote skin health and reduce signs of aging.
